reason: Confirmed by multiple sources: Phineas Nigellus Black was completely cut from all Harry Potter films. He appears nowhere - no dialogue, no portrait scenes, no agency. The justifications accurately describe total absence of personality, narrative role, motivations, and relationships. The only minor question is whether the arc score of 12/25 is slightly high given he has zero film presence whatsoever - a character with no screen time arguably can't 'preserve' even a flat arc. But the scorer's reasoning (nothing contradicts the arc) is defensible.
